candidates.why: Generic operating D&A line appears separately from the selected COGS bucket ('Property Operating Expenses - Real Estate Rental') and is not explicitly tied to cost of revenues/property operating costs. No COGS-specific D&A label is shown.
Separate depreciation line exists only in one year and appears to be a component/alternate detail of the generic D&A disclosure rather than a COGS-specific line.
Separate amortization detail is not labeled as COGS-related and appears to be a component/detail rather than a COGS-specific operating cost line.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS/cost-of-revenues D&A row is visible. The generic D&A disclosure does not clearly belong to the selected COGS bucket, so to avoid misallocation and double counting, do not add any row to COGS_DA.

candidates.why: Explicit operating D&A line appears separately at the same operating-section level as SG&A and above finance lines. The selected SG&A bucket includes 'Selling/General/Admin. Expense', while this D&A appears outside/alongside that bucket rather than as a nested component, so it should be added separately. Prefer the summary row over component details.
Likely a component/alternate year-specific detail of the broader D&A disclosure. Use the summary 'Depreciation & Amortization' row instead to avoid double counting.
Looks like granular detail beneath the broader D&A disclosure and is not preferable when a summary D&A row exists.

variables.notes: A separate operating D&A line is visible before finance items and appears outside the selected SG&A row(s). No separate R&D row is visible, so there is no XRD offset concern here. Use only the summary D&A row, not its components.
